title: Clever LMS Connect - API Reference
heading: Submissions
content:
**Schoology**

`state` cannot be updated

Auto-updates to `submitted` with an attachment, or `returned` if `grade_points` are included. `reclaimed` is not supported.

**Schoology**

`grade` behavior

Defaults to the `grade_points` value rather than using any string value provided.

**Schoology**

Grading category error

Submissions return 200 OK but **fail to appear in Schoology** if the assignment does not have a `grading_category` manually set by the teacher in the UI.

**Schoology**

Attachment types

Only `text` attachment types are supported for writes (`link` is only supported for reads). For Schoology writes, `type: "text"` attachments must include a `text` field. Do not send `url` for `text` attachments. Example request body: `{"state":"submitted","attachments":[{"type":"text","text":"https://clever.com/attachment","title":"Test - 1"}]}`.

  

  

> 🚧
> 
> ### 
> 
> Save your assignment IDs!
> 
> [](#save-your-assignment-ids)
> 
> There is currently no way for you to call the API for a list of your existing assignment IDs. Once an assignment has been created and an **assignment ID** has been generated, you will need to save each assignment ID you generate in your own database so that you can make adjustments to the assignments later. Failure to do this will result in an inability to access previously created assignments in the API. If this happens, please reach out to [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#dcb5b2a8b9bbaebda8b5b3b2af9cbfb0b9aab9aef2bfb3b1)

> 🚧

If this happens, please reach out to [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#bbd2d5cfdedcc9dacfd2d4d5c8fbd8d7decddec995d8d4d6)
